papers.title: A prenatal skin atlas reveals immune regulation of human skin morphogenesis
papers.relevance: Source atlas defining the 'Inflammatory DC' cell annotation in prenatal human skin.

papers.title: Single-Cell Analysis of Human Mononuclear Phagocytes Reveals Subset-Defining Markers and Identifies Circulating Inflammatory Dendritic Cells
papers.relevance: Landmark study identifying and characterizing DC3 as a distinct circulating inflammatory CD5-CD163+CD14+ dendritic cell subset within the cDC2 compartment, expanded in systemic lupus erythematosus.

papers.title: Transcriptional and Functional Analysis of CD1c+ Human Dendritic Cells Identifies a CD163+ Subset Priming CD8+CD103+ T Cells
papers.relevance: Defined DC3 as immediate precursors of inflammatory CD14+CD1c+CD163+FcεRI+ DCs, developing via a GM-CSF-dependent pathway independent of both cDC-restricted and monocyte-restricted progenitors.

papers.title: Single-cell analysis of human skin identifies CD14+ type 3 dendritic cells co-producing IL1B and IL23A in psoriasis
papers.relevance: Identified DC3 in human skin tissue by scRNA-seq, demonstrating their enrichment in psoriatic skin where they co-produce IL1B and IL23A.

papers.title: Mapping the developing human immune system across organs
papers.relevance: Comprehensive cross-organ atlas of the developing human immune system (4-17 PCW) that provides context for prenatal DC subsets. DC subsets were found to be transcriptionally conserved between adult and prenatal counterparts.

papers.title: Single-Cell RNA-Seq Reveals New Types of Human Blood Dendritic Cells, Monocytes, and Progenitors
papers.relevance: Original identification of DC2 and DC3 subpopulations within CD1c+ dendritic cells in human blood using single-cell RNA-seq.

papers.title: Monocyte-Derived Dendritic Cells: An Updated View on an Old Concept
papers.relevance: Comprehensive review of monocyte-derived DC biology, including evidence for the distinct ontogeny of DC3 from mo-DC.
